content: Now I'll create the pose-detection-build workflow template. Let me first check if there's a specific node image tag to use:

args.description: Check what node images other workflows use

output:
/home/coding/declarative-config/k8s/iad-ci/argo-workflows/acb-site-pages-build-workflowtemplate.yml:        image: docker.io/library/node:22
/home/coding/declarative-config/k8s/iad-ci/argo-workflows/acb-build.yml:        image: node:22-alpine
/home/coding/declarative-config/k8s/iad-ci/argo-workflows/fabric-ci-workflowtemplate.yml:        image: node:20-bookworm
/home/coding/declarative-config/k8s/iad-ci/argo-workflows/mobile-gaming-ci-workflowtemplate.yml:        image: node:20-bookworm
/home/co

args.content:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: pose-detection-build
  namespace: argo-workflows
  labels:
    app: pose-detection-build
spec:
  entrypoint: build
  serviceAccountName: argo-workflow
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: git-repo
        value: jedarden/pose-detection
      - name: branch
        value: main
  volumes:
    - name: docker-config
      secret:
        secretName: docker-hub-registry
        items:
          - key: .dockerconfigjson
            path: config.json
  templates:
    - name: build
      steps:
        - - name: test
            template: test
        - - name: resolve-version
            template: resolve-version
        - - name: docker-build
            template: docker-build
            arguments:
              parameters:
                - name: version
                  value: "{{steps.resolve-version.outputs.parameters.version}}"
        - - name: update-declarative-config
            template: update-declarative-config
            arguments:
              parameters:
                - name: version
                  value: "{{steps.resolve-version.outputs.parameters.version}}"

    - name: test
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 900
      script:
        image: node:20-alpine3.19
        command: [sh]
        source: |
          set -e
          git clone --branch {{workflow.parameters.branch}} \
            "https://github.com/{{workflow.parameters.git-repo}}.git" \
            /tmp/repo
          cd /tmp/repo
          npm ci
          npm run lint
          npm test
          npm run build
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 2Gi
          limits:
            cpu: 2000m
            memory: 4Gi

    - name: resolve-version
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 120
      script:
        image: alpine/git
        command: [sh]
        source: |
          set -e
          git clone --branch {{workflow.parameters.branch}} \
            "https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/{{workflow.parameters.git-repo}}.git" \
            /tmp/repo
          cd /tmp/repo

          if [ -f VERSION ]; then
            VERSION_CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD -- VERSION | grep -c '^VERSION$' || true)
            if [ "$VERSION_CHANGED" -gt 0 ]; then
              VERSION=$(cat VERSION | tr -d '[:space:]')
              echo "VERSION changed in commit — using ${VERSION}"
            else
              CURRENT=$(cat VERSION | tr -d '[:space:]')
              MAJOR=$(echo "$CURRENT" | cut -d. -f1)
              MINOR=$(echo "$CURRENT" | cut -d. -f2)
              PATCH=$(echo "$CURRENT" | cut -d. -f3)
              PATCH=$((PATCH + 1))
              VERSION="${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}"
              echo "Auto-bumping ${CURRENT} → ${VERSION}"
              echo "$VERSION" > VERSION
              git config user.email "github@jedarden.com"
              git config user.name "jedarden"
              git add VERSION
              git commit -m "ci: auto-bump version to ${VERSION}"
              git push
            fi
          else
            VERSION="0.1.4"
            echo "$VERSION" > VERSION
            git config user.email "github@jedarden.com"
            git config user.name "jedarden"
            git add VERSION
            git commit -m "ci: initialize VERSION file at ${VERSION}"
            git push
          fi

          echo "$VERSION" > /tmp/version
          echo "Building version: ${VERSION}"
        env:
          - name: GH_TOKEN
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                name: github-webhook-secret
                key: token
      outputs:
        parameters:
          - name: version
            valueFrom:
              path: /tmp/version

    - name: docker-build
      inputs:
        parameters:
          - name: version
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 1800
      retryStrategy:
        limit: "2"
        retryPolicy: OnError
        backoff:
          duration: 30s
          factor: "2"
      container:
        image: gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:v1.23.2
        args:
          - --context=git://github.com/{{workflow.parameters.git-repo}}.git#refs/heads/{{workflow.parameters.branch}}
          - --dockerfile=Dockerfile
          - --destination=ronaldraygun/gait-detection:{{inputs.parameters.version}}
          - --destination=ronaldraygun/gait-detection:latest
          - --build-arg=VERSION={{inputs.parameters.version}}
          - --cache=true
          - --cache-repo=ronaldraygun/cache
        env:
          - name: GIT_TOKEN
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                name: github-webhook-secret
                key: token
        volumeMounts:
          - name: docker-config
            mountPath: /kaniko/.docker
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 2Gi
          limits:
            cpu: 4000m
            memory: 8Gi

    - name: update-declarative-config
      inputs:
        parameters:
          - name: version
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 120
      script:
        image: alpine/git
        command: [sh]
        source: |
          set -e
          VERSION="{{inputs.parameters.version}}"

          git clone \
            "https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/jedarden/declarative-config.git" \
            /tmp/dc
          cd /tmp/dc

          MANIFEST="k8s/apexalgo-iad/gait/gait-detection-deployment.yml"
          sed -i "s|ronaldraygun/gait-detection:[^ ]*|ronaldraygun/gait-detection:${VERSION}|g" "$MANIFEST"

          git config user.email "github@jedarden.com"
          git config user.name "jedarden"
          git add -A
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "No image tag changes to commit"
          else
            git commit -m "ci: update gait-detection image to ${VERSION}"
            git push
          fi
        env:
          - name: GH_TOKEN
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                name: github-webhook-secret
                key: token
